title: POV: You Finally Understand Fair Value Gaps
description: POV: You've been trading for 2 years. Blowing accounts. Missing entries. Then ONE concept changes everything. This is the fair value gap moment nobody talks about. #ICTTrading #FairValueGap #SmartMonkeyConcepts #FundedTrader #R2FTrading
script: Two years trading. Eleven blown accounts. Then someone showed me one thing on a chart — and I never traded the same again. I was buying breakouts. Chasing candles. Getting stopped out every single time. Classic retail trap. Smart money was watching me fail. Fair value gaps. Price always returns to fill the imbalance. Stop chasing. Wait for the retracement. That's your entry. That's the secret. One concept. Funded in 60 days. Follow R2F Trading. We post setups like this every day.
